translations.definition: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís biyi'di binaanish t'ááła'ígo hólónígíí, tissues, ats'ą́ siláii ats'íís biyi'di hólǫ́ nidi doo choo'į́į dago yits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' yigáałii bits'íís hólónígíí ła' choyooł'į́ dóó binaanish hólónígíí t'áá yił aheełt'é

virus.definition: A small parasite that lives within the cells of other organisms, cannot reproduce without the help of the cell it lives inside of, and causes disease.

translations.definition: Hináanii doo yit'į́į dago nááná łahdę́ę́' yigáałgo ats'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di hiná silį́į́', dóó áadi hinááhts'óóz yee binahjį' noosééł yileeh áádóó bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ haleeh

water cycle.definition: The movement of water on, above, or below the surface of our planet.

translations.definition: Tó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó biyi' hólǫ́  dóó hót'ááhgóó dahólǫ́ éí hoo'nááł dóó danílínígíí bił ahééhwiizhíísh

white blood cell.definition: Cells that are part of the body's immune system that help the body fight infection and other diseases.

translations.definition: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís yee bihodééłníi da áyósin éí ii'noot'į́į́', infection, dóó ąąh dahwiidooł'aałii yich'ą́ą́h naalnish
Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, ał'ąą át'éego dahyikahígíí haalzííd dóó naalkaahgo bíhoo'aah

zygote.definition: The cell that forms after gametes are joined.

translations.definition: Amá dóó azhé'é bik'eelyéí bee i'niitsąądgo

ááhoo'níił nayiiłnání.definition: Ááhoo'nííł éí bee hahodilyaii t'áá ałtso nahasdzáán dóó yádiłhił bii' siláhígíí ahił nidaalnishgo nináháhááhígíí éí nayiił'ná hadoh dóó hak'az ádaat'éii.

translations.definition: Any non living factor that impacts an ecosystem. For example, temperature.

dił ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii bidił bee bééhózindooígíí ádaalyaa. Hadił łichíí'ígíí bikáá'gónaa áhoot'éhígíí bik'ehgo háidígííshį́į́ hadił A, B, O, doodago AB.

translations.definition: A system used to group human blood into different types, based on the presence or absence of certain characteristics on the surface of red blood cells. The four main blood types are A, B, O, and AB

atsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago bi'oh áb.word: atsiniltlish bilaah ei doodago bioh aboodziil
atsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago bi'oh áb.definition: Ha'át'íi da bitsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago a'oh yileehgo taah ji'áahgo níłch'i hydrogen bitsiniltł'ish hólǫ́ǫgo bits'á shígish.

translations.definition: A substance that becomes more positively or negatively charged during a chemical reaction and releases hydrogen ions when dissolved in water.

bił ho'dizhchíinii bee jíłdzilígíí.definition: Bee ájít'éii bił ho'dizhchínígíí ła' bee hadziilgo jiinánígíí hái da nááná ła' ákót'éhígíí doo bił yizhchínígíí bił ałch'į' naa'nil aheełt'éego haz'ą́ągi haalzííd.

translations.definition: A heritable trait that increases the fitness of an individual with that trait compared to individuals without that trait in a particular environment.

hináanii oochííł yaa ninísą́.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii oochííł yaa ninísą́ągo yaa hóyánígíí.

translations.definition: An organism that has reached sexual maturity.

kʼééʼdílyééh.definition: Dá'ák'eh, k'eelyéí, daneest'áanii, dóó iiná naalyé bíhoo'ą́ą́'

translations.definition: The art, science, or practice of cultivating the soil, growing crops, and raising livestock

entries.comment: this applies to all types of vegetation. Word will change If start talking about specific planting of something ie "plant corn, kil dilyeeh"

tátłʼid.definition: Tátł'id éí táyi' éí doodago hoditłéé'góó dahólǫ́ bits'íís bitł'óól t'áá łá'í éí doodago łą́ áádóó dootł'izh łeh éí doodago t'áá łahgo ánoolnin łeh.
tátłʼid.literal: łʼid= smoke , tá= under. =under water smoke type of thing/describing the hazyness of how it looks.

translations.definition: Unicellular or multicellular organisms occurring in fresh or salt water or moist ground, that have chlorophyll and other pigments but lack true stems, roots, and leaves
A particular version of a gene.

ats'íís bee nihwiileehii bá siléíí.definition: Ha'át'íi da náádaa łahdę́ę́' ha'át'íi da bił ahiih yilyéehgo bitsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago a'oh yileeh  taah ji'áahgo níłch'i hydrogen bitsiniltł'ish náyiilááh

translations.definition: A substance that becomes more positively or negatively charged during a chemical reaction and accepts hydrogen ions when dissolved in water.

biyáázh tsʼǫʼasánígíí.definition: Dahináanii bíígháán dahólónígíí  éí binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí binahjį' bits'íís sidoh dóó sik'azígíí éí (ectotherm wolyé). Yichííhgo táyi' naaleeh áádóó dahdínísééh dóó éí dóó  tábąąhdi dóó łeeshtahdi dahiná. Ch'ał ádaat'éii  dóó salamanders ááł ha'ní.

translations.definition: A vertebrate animal whose internal temperature depends on the environment (ectotherm). Most live in the water when young and live on land as adults. Examples include frogs, toads, and salamanders.

t'áádoole'é át'éegi nidanees'ą́ągi naalk.definition: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ baa ajółta' éí doodago jinéł'į́įgo nijiłkaah t'áá nináníłtsojį' éí bee béézhdi'dootį́į́ł biniyé.

translations.definition: To study or examine something in detail, in order to discover more about it

ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'ánísé.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á níséego iiná bitł'óól (DNA) bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii biyi'di naaki ałch'į' naazlá, éí t'áá ahedaałt'éego ałts'ákah dóó ahidiníł náádę́ę́' niikah áádóó ałts'á nísééh.

translations.definition: The stage of cell division in mitosis or meiosis in which the doubled set of chromosomes separates into two identical groups that move to opposite ends of the cell

azází.definition: Hak'éí nát'ą́ą́' ahool'áago hamá dóó hazhé'é dabishchíníinii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' hojizhlį́į́'ígíí

translations.definition: One from whom an individual is descended, whether on the father's or mother's side, at any number of generations.

naaldeehii.definition: Hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól (cells) daholónígíí biyi'di bijéí (nucleus) iiná bitł'óól dóó bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii nídahineeshzhee'. Dahináanii doo bíla'ashdla'ii ádaat'éhígíí.

translations.definition: A large group of multicellular eukaryotic organisms; organism other than man

naaldlooshii.literal: living things that trot or walk

ch'osh doo yit'íinii bee naatseedí.definition: Ch'osh doo yit'íinii bee yigání éí doodago bee ni'óolziní

translations.definition: A substance that kills or inhibits the growth of bacteria.

ats'íís bee doo bihodééłníinii.definition: Ats'íís bee doo bihodééłníinii ats'íís hasht'éé yoodlíiłii (protein) áyiił'įįh ats'íís atíidoolíłii yaa ákoniizįįhgo

translations.definition: A protein produced by the body's immune system when it detects harmful substances

biką' dóó bi'áadii t'áá gééd oochííł.word: bika doo biaadii taa geed oochiil
biką' dóó bi'áadii t'áá gééd oochííł.definition: Azhé'é t'áágééd i'niitsąąh dóó ni'iichííh. Amá t'áá sáhá idínóoltsąął dóó adoołchííł.

translations.definition: The process of creating offspring without exchanging genetic information with another organism through sex.

atom.definition: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ bee ályaii t'ááłá'í si'ą́ągo, atom wolyé, bijéí hólǫ́, bijéí biyi'di proton biniltł'ish shábik'ehgo bii' silá éí positive deiłní dóó neutron bitsiniltł'ish bąą ádin ákondi yee óchíidii, béésh ná'iiláhá nahalingo bii' hólǫ́. Atom bijéí bii' siléí

translations.definition: The smallest component of an element having the chemical properties of the element, consisting of a nucleus containing combinations of neutrons and protons and one or more electrons

ats'íís bitł'óól biziil.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di t'áádoole'é si'ą́ągo ats'íís bitł'óól yee biinéí dooígíí bii' nihwiileeh dóó náásgóó ííł'į́

translations.definition: Principal molecule for storing and transferring energy in cells.

ats'íís ádík'ijį' naalnish.definition: Ats'íís iisiihgo ádík'ijį' naalnish yileehgo ats'íís doo bąąhtééh da yę́ę niyiiłchxǫǫh yileeh

translations.definition: Occurs when the body's immune system attacks and destroys healthy body tissue by mistake

bich'iiyą' t'áá bí ííł'íinii.definition: Hináanii t'áá bí ch'iyáán yidooyį́į́łígíí ííł' į́ t'áá ákǫ́ǫ́h binaagóó hólónígíí adinídíín dóó t'áádoole'é ałtah nihwiileehgo ahił nidaalnishígíí bits'ą́ą́ biziil choyooł'į́įgo

translations.definition: An organism capable of making its own food from inorganic substances using light or chemical energy (compare with heterotroph)

chʼosh doo yitʼínii.definition: Hináanii doo yit'íinii. Bee adéest'į́į́' dabidziilígíí t'éí bee daat'į́.

translations.definition: An organism too small to be seen without a microscope

ats'íís bee haleehii ałch'į' nanideeh.definition: Bee iiná hodooleełii nucleotide naakigo ahidii'ash éí ats'íís bitł'óól DNA yileeh

translations.definition: Two nucleotides (also known as bases) that combine and join to make DNA. Base A combines with T and base G combines with C.
How an organism acts

bee iináanii nidaalnish.definition: Hináanii bits'íístahdi t'áá ałtso ahił nidaalnishgo yee hiná dóó bits'íís bitł'óól hazhó'ó danéesé

translations.definition: In organisms, chemical reactions that help sustain life and allow cells to grow

hináanii ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí.definition: Iiná ał'ąą ádaat'éego bits'ą́ą́dóó ayoonaałígíí éí díí dahináanii t'áá ałtso, bik'ehgo yee oołchíiłii dóó naaldeehgo bá nahaz'áą́góó dóó hózhǫ́ǫgo bá dahoo'a'gi

translations.definition: The variety of life and its processes, including the variety of living organisms, the genetic differences among them, and the communities and ecosystems in which they occur

nahasdzáán iiná ánáyoodlííł.definition: Níłch'i nitrogen, t'eesh carbon dóó t'áádoole'é doo dahináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí inorganic substances bił ááhoo'níiłgo bił hoogáałígíí hináanii nídanidlį́ dóó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó ał'ąą nídadilzhish

translations.definition: The cycle in which nitrogen, carbon, and other inorganic elements of the environment are converted into the organic substances of animals or plants and released back into the environment

iiná naalkaah.definition: Dahináanii t'áá ałtso baa nahodigį'go naalkaah
iiná naalkaah.literal: iiná=life, naalkaah= study. means to study life.

translations.definition: The scientific study of life and living organisms

iina bá yá'áhoot'éehgo haz'ą́.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáagi haashį́į́ honíłtso haz'ą́ągo nanise' dóó naaldeehii bá yá'áhoot'éehgo bił hoolzhish

translations.definition: A regional or global land area that is characterized by the plants, animals and climate in that area

hináanii bee hahodít'éegi.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó áhoołts'óózígo honít'i'go iiná bináhaazlá

translations.definition: The thin zone surrounding Earth where all life exists

hináanii ahił nidaalnish.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó hináanii kéédahat'į́įgo bił nahaz'ánígíí hináanii t'áá át'é yiłdi'ígíí

translations.definition: Any living thing that has an effect on another organism, population, community, or ecosystem

nida'iichííh yéélta'ígíí.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii kééhat'į́įgi t'áá hoolzhishgóne' t'áá át'é yéélta'go dóó éí hoolzhishígíí haashį́į́ néelą́ą́' ániid náádaazhchínígíí yéélta'go ałhąą naa'nil.

translations.definition: The number of total live births in comparison to the total population size in a specified community or area over a specified period of time

dił.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii bits'íístoo' dóó hináago naaldeehii bits'íístoo' bits'íístahgóó dóó bits'íís bitł'óól biyi'góó níłch'i dóó ch'iyáán dóó yee hináanii ayiił'eeł áádóó ats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdii níláhgóó ats'á yiile

translations.definition: Body fluid in humans and other animals that delivers necessary substances such as nutrients and oxygen to the cells and transports waste away those cells

nanise' ałtaas'éí naalkaah.definition: Chil dóó nanise' ał'ąą ádaat'éii naalkaah

translations.definition: The scientific study of plants

atsiighąąʼ.definition: Ats'íís bii' siléí ats'íís t'áá át'é naalnishgo áyósin, ádahoot'éii t'áá ałtso yaa ákonízin dóó yénálniih, dóó bik'izhdiitáanii baa nitsídzíkees dóó háni' nilíinii yiyoołnaał
atsiighąąʼ.literal: ghąąʼ= matter. atsii= heads. So the "matter in your head"

translations.definition: The organ in the body which controls the functions of the body, interprets and stores information, and affects intelligence and emotion.

bee na'nit'inii.definition: Hináago naaldeeh dóó nidaat'a'ii binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí yee hadiit'įįhgo doo yit'į́į da yileeh

translations.definition: When organisms disguise their appearance to blend in with their surroundings

łikání bich'į' iinéí.definition: Ch'iyáán íiyisíí bee ats'íís bidziil dóó biinéí áyósinígíí. Łikání t'éí át'é.

translations.definition: An important nutrient used as energy by the body and made mostly of sugars

níłch'i carbon dioxide náhoodleeł.definition: Níłch'I carbon dioxide wolyéhígíí hót'ááhgóó dóó níłch'I bitahgóó, dahináanii bitahgóó dóó táyi'góó hoo'nááłgo ahééhwiilzhíísh

translations.definition: The movement of carbon dioxide between the atmosphere, living organisms, and land and acquatic ecosystems.
Animals that eat other animals

hináanii kéyah choyooł'į́.definition: Naaldlooshii haashį́į́ néelt'e'go íiyisíí kéyah bikáá'go da' ayą́ągo bihonéedzą́

translations.definition: Maximum population size of the species that the environment can sustain, given the food, habitat, water, and other necessities available in the environment

bee adiiltłáadii.definition: Bee adiiltłáadii t'áadoole'é ahidiilyéego bee bina'anishígíí

translations.definition: Any substance that increases the rate of a reaction without itself being consumed

ats’íís bik’ǫ́ǫ́’.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól éí ats'íís bee ályaaígíí ts'ídá t'ááłá'ígo si'ánígíí náhidínísé, binaagóó yaa ákonízin, dóó ádéé'ál'į́įgo noosééł.

translations.definition: The cell is the smallest unit with the basic properties of life, such as growth, sensing the environment, and reproduction.

entries.comment: refers to DNA in cell. Often used when talking about cancer

hinááhts'ózí.literal: hinááh = life, ts'óózí=small. Means "small unit of life"

translations.definition: A part of a neuron that contains the nucleus where incoming signals are received.

ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á dahinisé.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á níséehgo bee ats'íís bitł'óól ániidígíí náhoodleeł

translations.definition: The formation of new cells when an existing cell divides.

ats'íí bitł'óól bik'ésti'í.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól bik'ésti'í éí ak'ah bizhool dóó ch'iyáán ats'íís hasht'ééyooldlíiłii bizhool bee ályaago ats;íís bikésti'

translations.definition: Network of lipids and proteins that forms the boundary between the inside of a cell and the environment that surrounds it.  Also called a plasma membrane.

nanise' bihinááhts'óóz bikágí.definition: Chil nanise', ch'osh doo yit'íinii dóó naaldeehii danilínígíí  yee nanise' dóó nanit'ąígíí bikágí.

translations.definition: A structural layer surrounding cells of plants, bacteria, and other non-animal cells, found just outside the cell membrane

nanise' binéí á'dólzin.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól yee biinéí dóó hinánígíí yee ádinaalnishígíí

translations.definition: The process through which cells convert sugars into ATP (energy)

atsiniltł'ish.definition: T'áá ha'át'íi da protons dóó electrons bináhaazléí wólta'go bitsiniltł'ish ánéelt'e dóó ábóodziilígíí

translations.definition: The amount of electricity an object has, determined by the number of protons and electrons it has

ha'át'íi da doo łahgo ánéehii.definition: Ha'át'íi da t'ááłáhági át'éego hadít'é dóó t'ááłáhági át'éego naalnishígíí

translations.definition: A substance that has a constant composition and characteristic properties.

t'áádoole'é biziil.definition: T'áádoole'é yee bidziilii yee ałch'į' bótá'ii. Díí ałtsá'niłgo yee bidziilii áyóó' át'éego sidogo bits'áshígish

translations.definition: This type of energy is what holds atoms of a molecule or molecules of a substance together. When these groups of atoms or molecules are separated during a chemical reaction, chemical energy is released, often as heat.  When organisms photosynthesize or digest food, chemical reactions provide chemical energy for their growth and development.

t'áádoole'é łahgo áániił.definition: Ha'át'íi da t'ááła' bizhi'go t'áá náó'nííłgo bits'ą́ą́dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ náádleeł doo áko bee ályaii yee da'áhótą'ígíí ałts'á há'nííł éí doodago łahgo át'éego ádaalne'

translations.definition: Any process in which substances combine or are broken down into other substances when chemical bonds between atoms are formed or broken

t'áádoole'é adinídíín yee biziil ánáyood.definition: Hinááts'ózí cells binaagóó ha'át'íi da doo hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí yee biinéí doo bidziil dooígíí t'áá bí ííł'į́

translations.definition: Cells that create their own energy and biological materials from inorganic chemicals

nanise' bitoo' dootł'izhí.definition: Nanise' yee dadootł'izhígíí adinídíín (shánídíín) łahgo áyiił'įįhgo bee bitoo' naalnish yileehgo biinéí

translations.definition: Any green molecule that converts light energy into chemical energy during photosynthesis

nanise' biziil ííł'íní.definition: Nanise' bihiináts'ózí biyi'di si'ą́ągo adinídíín yee binéí áyosinígíí

translations.definition: A cell organelle that produces energy through photosynthesis

iiná bitł'óól bit'oh.definition: Iiná bitł'óól nídahineeshzhee'go ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di dahólónígíí

translations.definition: A structure made up of DNA tightly coiled many times around proteins

habił dóó ts'ísee háni' nilį́.definition: Niyiiłkaah dóó aná'át'áahjį' hats'íís biyi'di ajiłhosh, ninájílnish dóó hasht'ez dít'é bee bíhólníihgo nijigháhígíí

translations.definition: A natural, internal process that regulates daily cycles of sleep or inactivity and wakefulness or activity

hats'oos.definition: Hats'íístahgóó hadił nidaazlį́įgo bee níłch'i dóó ch'iyáán hats'íís bitah hólǫ́ǫgo áyósin áádóó hats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdígíí hats'áyiiléego jiinánígíí. Kót'éego binaanishígíí éí hajéídíshjool, hats'oos łichí'í dóó hats'oos dootł'izhí.

translations.definition: The system that moves blood, oxygen, nutrients, waste, and other materials throughout the body. The circulatory system includes the heart, arteries, and veins

níłch'i ał'ąą ánáá'nííł łahgo áániił.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó hót'ááhgóó áhoot'éhígíí hado dóó hak'az, níłtsą́, dóó nídaadzasígíí łahgo áániił. T'áá bí éí łahgo ánáánííł nít'ę́ę́' k'adgo níłch'i carbon dioxide wolyéhígíí bilááh ánéelt'e' silį́į́' ałk'idą́ą́' dahináanii bik'éé dahwiilzhiizhii bits'ą́ą́dóó kǫ' choo'į́įgo biniinaa níłch'i ał'ąą ánáá'nííł łahgo áyiilaa.

translations.definition: The change in global or regional weather patterns over time.  This occured naturally over time, but recently increased levels of carbon dioxide due to the use of fossil fuels from the mid to late ą)th century onwards has caused climate change to occur faster.
A form of inheritance in which both alleles are expressed equally in the phenotype of the heterozygote

t'ááłáhági kéédahat'į́.definition: T'áá łáhági haz'ą́ągi ha'át'ííshį́į́ dahinááshį́į́ ahił nidaalnish dahinánígíí

translations.definition: Interacting group of various species in a common location

bee iináanii ałghaadzį́į́s.definition: Dahináanii t'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągo kééhat'į́įgo bee da'iináanii ałghadeidit'áahígíí

translations.definition: A negative interaction that occurs whenever two or more organisms require the same limited resource

báhádzidii ayánígíí.definition: Ha'át'íi da bideezla' ayóo atí'áł'į́įgo ats'íís átííł'ínígíí

translations.definition: A highly reactive substance that causes obvious damage to living tissue

hinááhts'ózí biyi' di bijéí binaagóó hól.word: hinaahtsozi biyi di bijei binaagoo holonigii
hinááhts'ózí biyi' di bijéí binaagóó hól.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól biyi' hólónígíí t'áá át'é ákondi bijéí nucleus éí doo bił ólta'góó

translations.definition: All of the contents of a cell excluding the nucleus

bee ééhóznii yéélta'ii.definition: T'áá ha'át'íi da dayéélta', bída'néél'ąądígíí, saad da, haalzíidgo bikáá' ályaii, dóó baa hane'go aha'ádaalyaii

translations.definition: A collection of facts, such as numbers, words, measurements, observations or descriptions of thing

łahgo haz'ą́ bii' anoonééł.definition: Haa'í da diné kééhat'į́įgo daashį́į́ néelt'e' ákwe'é kééhát'į́ éí daashį́į́ néelt'e' haashį́į́ nízahjį' nihoolzhiizhgo daneeznánígíí/bikéé' ádahasdįįd yéélta'ígíí ałch'į' sinilgo baa hane'

translations.definition: The number of total deaths in comparison to the total population size in a specified community or area over a specified period of time

hináanii diłdzid.definition: Hináanii ła' daaztsą́ągo ch'osh doo yit'íinii dóó dláád ádaat'éii yaa tįįh yikaigo ałtso dííłdzidgo

translations.definition: The breakdown of dead organism through the action of bacteria and fungi

hináanii diłdzidgo leezh náádleeł.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináá nít'ę́ę'go ádin silį́į́' dóó bits'íís táánoodééh dóó dííyahgo ła' łeezh nídaasdlį́į́' dóó bits'iilzéí dahólǫ́.

translations.definition: The process by which dead organic substances are broken down into simpler organic or inorganic material
Barren area of land where little precipitation occurs

nishigizh.definition: T'áá ha'át'íi da bizhool molecules łą́ hólónídóó áłch'į́į́dí hólǫ́ǫjį' ashiigéeshgo

translations.definition: The movement of molecules from an areas where there are many to where there are fewer

ch'iyáán náyoołkąąłii.definition: Atsą́ níléí ch'iyáán dóó jidlánígíí néedił'eel dóó bitoo' ádaat'éí yee ats'íís bidziil, biinéí, dóó hats'íís háidoodlííł. Ha'át'ííshį́į́ hats'íís doo choyooł'į́į da dooígíí éí hach'íí' bee níláhgóó kót'į́

translations.definition: The organs that take in food and liquids and break them down into substances that the body can use for energy, growth, and tissue repair. Waste products the body cannot use leave the body through bowel movements

hinááhts'ozí iiná bitł'óól naaki bee hól.word: hinaahtsozi iina bitlool naaki bee holo
hinááhts'ozí iiná bitł'óól naaki bee hól.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól éí doodago hináanii bi iiná bitł'óól ałk'í daadeesdizígíí chromosomes naaki níláago bee dahólónígíí

translations.definition: A cell or organism having two sets of chromosome

ąąh dahaz'ą́.definition: Ats'íís haashį́į́ yidzaago doo hazhó'ó naalnish da silį́į'go bee bihodiit'i'

translations.definition: A change in a living body that prevents it from functioning normally.

iiná bitł'óól.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól nineezgo hats'íís biyi'di hólónígíí bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii yee hadít'é. Bik'ehgo ch'iyáán ats'íís ánáyoodlíiłii proteins hats'íístahgóó hólónígíí nihwiileeh.

translations.definition: A long molecule that contains our unique genetic information. It holds the instructions for making all of the proteins in our bodies.

iiná bitł'óól ádéé'alnééh.definition: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á hiniséego iiná bitł'óól biyi'di dahólónígíí bééda'alne'

translations.definition: The process by which DNA is copied during cell division

bee ats'íís haleehii alą́ąjį' naalnish.definition: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii bee ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'éhígíí áyiił'įįh hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás ooch'íiłii bee hojileehígíí aheełt'éego (homozygote) éí doodago doo aheełt'ée dago (heterozygote)

translations.definition: The allele that determines the phenotype when present in a homozygote or heterozygote. Compare with recessive.

bee ats'íís haleehii alą́ąjį' naalnish b.word: bee atsiis haleehii alaaji naalnish bee ajite yileehii
bee ats'íís haleehii alą́ąjį' naalnish b.definition: Ho'dizhchíídóó hojizhlį́į'go ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'éhígíí bee jinooséełii hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii alą́ąjį' (dominant) naalnishígíí bik'ehgo jinoosééł silį́į'go.  Recessive éí bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii akéédóó bik'ehgo anoosééł.

translations.definition: An inherited characteristic that appears in an offspring if it is received from a parent through a dominant allele. Compare with recessive trait.

naaldeehii bił haz'ą́.definition: Hináanii ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí bił haz'ą́ągi ahił dahi'ná dóó binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí chodayooł'ínígíí

translations.definition: The study of how organisms interact with one another and with their environment

hináanii bił haz'ą́.definition: Dahináanii kééhat'į́įgi áádóó ákwe'é haz'ą́ągi t'áá ałtsoní bee hahodít'éego haz'ą́

translations.definition: Place where an organism or a community of organisms lives, including all living and nonliving factors or conditions of the environment

naaldeehii yee sizilí.definition: Hináanii naaldeehii binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí bik'ehgo bits'íístahdi sizil dóó náhiniik' áás

translations.definition: An organism whose internal temperature depends on the temperature of their surrounding environment
The female sex cell, or gamete. Compare with sperm.

atom bináhaazléí.definition: Atoms bee ályaii shádáahjigo bitsiniltł'ish hoo'nááłígíí

translations.definition: The components of an atom that have a negative charge

áʼádaatʼéhígíí.definition: Ha'át'íi da atom t'ááłá'ígo bee ályaaígíí. Atom t'ááłá'i yileehgo doo tanáó'níiłgo ha'át'íi da náádoodleeł da.

translations.definition: A pure substance that is made of only one type of atom. Elements cannot be broken down into any simpler substance.

ch'ída'iinééh.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii dayikah nít'ę́ę́' yits'á dahanééhgo nááná łahjí dahyikahígíí yił yah adahnéehgo.

translations.definition: The migration of individuals out of a particular population or area to other populations or areas.  Compare with immigration.

ats'íís sizilígíí.definition: Dahinánii dóó naaldeehii bits'íís silzil dóó náhiniik'áásígíí t'áá łáhági silkidgo ádayósinígíí. Binaadę́ę́' nahooniidoh dóó náhoniik'asígíí éí doo binahjį' bits'íís sizil da.

translations.definition: An organism whose internal temperature can be contantly maintained and does not depend on the temperature of their surrounding environment

’ahóodziil.definition: T'áádoole'é biziil yee biinéí dóó bidziilgo yee naalnish, ha'át'íi da łahgo áyooliił, doodago hadoh bits'ą́ą́dóó hólǫ́ (thermal energy). Łą́ ał'ąą át'é.
’ahóodziil.literal: ’ahóodziil= energy. (you modify the a depending what you're talking about)

translations.definition: The ability to do work, produce change, or create heat.  There are many types of energy.  For example, heat energy (also known as thermal energy) is created when molecules move around quickly and randomly within a substance, which releases heat.  Chemical energy is what holds atoms of a molecule or molecules of a substance together.  When these groups of atoms or molecules are separated during a chemical reaction, chemical energy is released, often as heat.  When organisms photosynthesize or digest food, chemical reactions provide chemical energy for their growth and development.

shá biziil dahináanii bitah silį́į́'ígíí.definition: Shá bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' deesdoiígíí hináanii bił nahaz'ą́ądi dóó biyi'di hasht'e dit'eehígíí.

translations.definition: A picture that represents how much energy, initially from the sun, is retained or stored in living organisms at each trophic level in an ecosystem

kéyah bikáa'gi haz'ánígi.definition: Dahináanii dóó naaldeehii bá haz'ą́ągi níłch'I, tó, dóó kéyah yee dahinánígíí

translations.definition: The air, water, and land in or on which all living organisms live

ch'iyáán yidiłidí.definition: Naaldeehii bits'íístahdi ch'iyáán yididiiłił go yee bidziil dóó hináadoogo éí ch'iyáán bits'íístahdi shoogishígíí yee yidiłidígíí hodooleeł éí ch'iyáán yidiiłtláadgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biinéí dóó bidziil.

translations.definition: A substance that acts as a catalyst in living organisms, regulating the rate at which chemical reactions proceed without itself being altered in the process

akágí.definition: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii, organ, ats'íís bik'ésti'ígíí

translations.definition: An organ that formes the outer protective layer of the body.

ahíhooneel'ą́.definition: Ha'át'éegi da haz'ą́ągi t'áá ałtsoní hasht'e dadiit'eeh dóó ha'át'íi da doo ba'át'e' hólǫ́ǫ da yileeh. Ha'át'íi da doo ałk'ijį dooldził da, ahíhoneel'ą́ haleeh.

translations.definition: A state of balance or stable situation where opposite effects cancel each other out and no changes are occuring.

hináanii bihinááhts'ózí bijéí dahólónígí.definition: Ha'át'íi da hinááts'óóz t'ááła'í si'ą́ągo bits'íís nilį́įgo biyi'di bijéí, nucleus doo hólǫ́ǫ da

translations.definition: A unicellular organism that does not have a nucleus and has few organelles.  Compare with eukaryote.

bee éédahozinii.definition: Ha'át'íida t'áá aaníí át'é bee bééhózinígíí nídiilyáago binahjį' baa ha'oodzíí' dóó woodlánígíí t'áá aaníigo baa nitsáhákees.

translations.definition: The available facts or information that indicate a belief or statement is true or valid

ayoonaał.definition: Ayoonaałgo bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo ánídaa'níiłgo bik'ehgo ahii' háá' ayoochííł.

translations.definition: Changes in the frequency of alleles over generations

hináanii bits'a'.definition: Hináanii bits'a' dahólónígíí bits'íís bits'a' yee naazį́ dóó naaghá.

translations.definition: A hard covering on the outside of the body used for support, protection, and muscle attachment. Examples include the shells of snails and the outer covering of beetles.

t'áádoole'é nabíhonitaah.definition: Ha'át'íi da t'áá aaníí át'é dóó ó'ooł'įįłgi nabíhonitaahgo naalkaah.

translations.definition: A test done in order to learn something or to discover whether something works or is true.

hináanii ła' bił ahóóyá.definition: Ha'át'íi da ałtso eeldee' éí doodago bił ahóóyáago doo ła' yidziih da silį́į́'ígíí

translations.definition: Occurs when there are no more individuals of that species alive anywhere in the world

hináanii ałtso iildéeh.definition: Dahináanii ła' ha'át'ííshį́į́ biniinaa áádįįł silį́į'go

translations.definition: The act or process of a species becoming extinct

ak'eelyéí ahidiinahgo iilts'ąąh.definition: Hináanii biką' dóó bi'áádígíí bik'eelyéí ahidiina'go bits'ą́ą́dóó biyázhí iilts'ą'ígíí.

translations.definition: The process of combinine the male sperm with the female egg to produce a cell called a zygote.

hohónéedzą́.definition: Hináanii biyázhí yishchínígíí yisdádoogáałgo bidziilgo hináadoo

translations.definition: The ability of an individual to produce successful offspring compared to other individuals of the same species.

ch'iyáán hinílá.definition: Dahináanii ałkéé' bił honí'ą́ągo dahnaazhjaa'go bich'iiyą' nídanidlį́

translations.definition: A linear sequence of organisms through which nutrients and energy pass as one organism eats another

ch'iyáán bee hahodít'é.definition: Ch'iyáán dahideezláádóó dahiníláajį' bee hahodít'éego nahaz'ą́. Łahgóó ahéédadiit'I'

translations.definition: Represents multiple pathways through which energy and nutrients flow through an ecosystem. It includes many intersecting food chains. It demonstrates that most organisms eat, and are eaten, by more than one species.
Evidence of living organisms that lived long ago

ats'iil choo'ínígíí.definition: Dahináanii daneeznánée dadiłdzid bits'ą́ą́dóó ha'át'íi da nihwiileehígíí biziil (energy) bits'áłdohígíí (heat) bee nida'anish. Nahasdzáán biyi'di dahólǫ́ haashį́į́ danéelt'e'go. Łeejin/tsékǫ', ak'ah łizhiní dóó níłch'i  ászólí ááh ha'ní.

translations.definition: A material formed from the decomposing organisms that can release energy as heat or be used for work. These fuels are found within the Earth and exist in limited quantities. Examples include coal, oil, and natural gas.

dláád.definition: Hináanii bich'iiyą' binaagóó hólónígíí néidił'eełgo bikágí biníkáágóne'  biihishigéeshgo yee hiná.

translations.definition: Living organisms that get their nutrients by absorbing them.

ak'eelyéí bee idí'nóotsąąłii.definition: Bi'áadii bik'eelyéí bihinááts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óóól ałk'ídaadeesdizígíí chromosomes t'áá ałní'ígo ánéelt'e' dóó biką'ii bik'eelyéí bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óóól ałk'ídaadeesdizígíí chromosomes t'áá ałní'ígo ánéelt'e'ígíí ahidiinahgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biyázhí (zygote) bits'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídadeesdizígíí t'áá át'é bii' dahólǫ́.

translations.definition: A haploid reproductive cell that joins with another haploid reproductive cell of the opposite sex to form a diploid zygote.

bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łago át'e silį́į.word: bikehgo naas oochiilii lago ate siliiigii taa ate
bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łago át'e silį́į.definition: Iiná bitł'óól bąąhgi bik'ehgo jinooséełgo t'áá jizį́į́ nít'ę́ę́' ájít'é dooleełígíí

translations.definition: A section of DNA that is the unit of heredity for a trait.

bik'ehgo náás oochíiłiii.definition: T'áá hoolzhishgi dahináanii t'áá sahdii dahyikahgo yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é daazlį́į'ígíí t'áá ałtso ááł jiní

translations.definition: All of the alleles of all the genes in a population of a specific species at a given time.

hináanii t'áá ałtso yíníłdzilii.definition: Hoolzhishgo ał'ąą ánáhoo'níiłgo hináanii yídaníłdzilígíí náás yikah dóó oołchíiłgo bits'íís hadidzaaígíí ayóo yit'į́. Łahgo át'éego éí hináanii bił áhoot'éhígíí doo yíníłdzilgóó éí t'óó áádįįł dóó bits'íís doo łahgo áániił da doo.

translations.definition: The process where organisms with the highest fitness in an environment survive and reproduce and their phenotypes become more common in the next generation. At the same time, organisms with the lowest fitness fail to survive or reproduce less and their phenotypes become less common in the next generation.

hináan t'áá ła' yikahígíí.definition: Hináanii t'áá ałhąąh daazhchí dóó danihinánígíí, Amá dóó ach'é'é éí naakidi azhchínígíí át'é

translations.definition: All of the organisms born and living at about the same time. In humans, mother and daughters represent two generations

iiná bitł'óól łahgo ádzaii binaałniih.definition: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii ałkéé' sinilyę́ę łahgo ádzaago ba'át'e' hazlį́į'go bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ bił oochííł yileeh.

translations.definition: A disease that is caused by a change (mutation) in an individual's DNA sequence

iiná bitł'óól łahgo ályaa.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bits'íís dóó bíni' da yee hadít'éhígíí t'áá ákólnéehgo be'iiná bitł'óól łahgo ál'įįhígíí

translations.definition: The deliberate modification of the characteristics of an organism by changing its DNA or RNA

bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii naalkaah.definition: Dahináanii yik'ehgo náás oołchííłígíí dóó yił oołchíiłii nidaalkaahgo t'áá át'é bíhoo'aah

translations.definition: The study of genes and inheritance in living organisms

hináanii be'iiná bitł'óól t'áá ałtso.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól t'áá ałtso bits'íís bii' hólónígíí

translations.definition: All of an organism's DNA

hái da bi allele t'áá ałtso.word: hai da bi allele taa altso
hái da bi allele t'áá ałtso.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é daazlį́į́'ígíí t'áá ałtso

translations.definition: All of the alleles in a given individual's genome

nahasdzáán naalkaah.definition: Nahasdzáán ninálkaahgo ha'át'íi da yee hadít'éhígíí, biyi'di dóó bikáá'góó hólónígíí dahazlį́į́'dę́ę́' dóó yee naalnishígíí bíhoo'aah

translations.definition: The science that deals with the earth's physical structure, the materials it is made of, its history, and the processes that act on it.

nahasdząąn bikáá'góó honiidóóh.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó sidooígíí de'áániił. Níłch'i hado yił hidideełígíí, greenhouse gases, łą́ dahshoogish silį́į́'ígíí biniinaa nahasdzáán ayóo sido silį́į́'.

translations.definition: The increase in the Earth's average temperature. Recently, temperatures are rising rapidly due to increases in the levels of greenhouse gases.

chʼiyáán náálkąąd bee jiinánígíí.definition: Łikání hadił bitahdi hólǫ́ǫgo íiyisíí bee hadziil dóó hwiinéí áhósinígíí óolyé. Łikání glucose wolyéhígíí hadił bitahdi hólǫ́ éí hats'íís ííł'į́įgo hadił bitahdi niheleeh.
chʼiyáán náálkąąd bee jiinánígíí.literal: chʼiyáán=food, bee jiinánígíí = keeping you alive... means "something about the food is keeping you alive"

translations.definition: The simple sugar that is the main source of energy. Glucose is found in the blood and is the main sugar that the body makes.

níłch'i hado yiłhidideełii.definition: Níłch'i nahasdzáán bikáá'góó náhoniidohígíí yił hidideeł dóó doo yiidichxíid dago biniinaa doo nahasdzáán bits'ą́ąjį' aheldóoh da.

translations.definition: Any gas that can absorb heat from Earth's surface and keeps it from leaving the atmosphere into space.

iiná bitł'óól t'áá łá'í.definition: Hinááts'ózí éí doodago hináanii bits'íístahdi iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizígíí chromosomes t'ááłáhájí t'éí biyi'di hólǫ́

translations.definition: A cell or organism having a single set of chromosomes

naaldlooshii ch'il yiłchozhígíí.definition: Na'at'i'í éí doodago naaldlooshii chil deiłchozhígíí

translations.definition: Animals that eat plants

bił náás oochíił.definition: Dahináanii yizhchíigo bimá dóó bizhé'é yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii bee bik'i' aschínígíí yee hadít'é yileeh

translations.definition: The passing on of traits from parents to offspring through genetic information.

hináanii ch'il dóó naaldlooshii yiyánígí.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bidziil dóó yee hináadoo biniyé ch'il/nanise' dóó níláhgóó dahináanii yiyą́

translations.definition: An organism that eats plants or animals for energy and nutrients (compare with autotroph)

bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii naaki ał'ąą át'é.word: bikehgo naas oochiilii naaki alaa ate
bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii naaki ał'ąą át'é.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii bi'iiná bitł'óól bąąhgi bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii gene naaki ał'ąą át'éego hólónígíí

translations.definition: An individual who has two different alleles of a gene. Compare with homozygote.

haigo iilhoshii.definition: Haigo éí doodago ch'iyáán doo łą́ dahólǫ́ǫ da haleehgo na'at'i'í dóó naaldlooshii bits'íís ni'át'įįh, doo ayóo naha'ná da, doo ayóo sizil da,

translations.definition: A state in which an animal’s body processes are slower than usual, its body temperature falls, and its activities are limited, usually during winter or when food is scarce.

t'ááłáhági áhoot'é.definition: Níláhgóó ał'ąą ánáhoo'níił nidi ats'íístah di doodago hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di t'ááłáhági áhoot'é.

translations.definition: The ability of the body or a cell to maintain a stable internal environment despite changes in external conditions.

iiná bitł'óól aheełt'é.definition: Iiná bitł'óól, DNA dóó RNA t'áá áłah ałkéé' danéedééhígíí, ats'íís bee haleehii proteins, éí doodago bik'ehgo ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'é yileehígíí ahedaałt'éego

translations.definition: Similarity of DNA or RNA sequences, proteins, or traits due to shared ancestry

bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii naaki aheełt'é.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii ła' biyik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é silį́į́'ígíí naakigo bee hólǫ́.

translations.definition: An individual who has two of the same alleles for a gene. Compare with heterozygote.

akááz bitoo'.definition: Akááz bitoo' ats'íís yee ákonízinígíí. Ats'íís biyi'di haleeh aadóó ats'íístahgóó hoo'nááł yileeh.

translations.definition: Chemical substances that act as messenger molecules in the body. After being made in one part of the body, they travel to other parts of the body where they help control how cells and organs do their work

tó bitah yileehii.definition: Ha'át'íi da bizhool,  molecules, éí doodago bikáá'góó tó bił ałtah yileehígíí

translations.definition: Molecules and surfaces that do interact with water

tó doo bitah yileehii.definition: Ha'át'íi da bizhool,  molecules, éí doodago bikáá'góó tó doo bił ałtah yileehígíí

translations.definition: Molecules and surfaces that do no interact with water

haalzíí baa ha'oodzíí'.definition: T'áádoole'é haalzíidgo haa da yit'ée doogo dóó bídí'nóol'ąął bohónéedzą́ baa ha'oodzíí'ígíí

translations.definition: A testable statement that explains a set of observations.

yah i'iinééh.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii tádínéehgo bíla'ashdla'ii bił haz'ą́ągo yitah yinééh éí doodago nááná łahgi haz'ą́ągi niinééhgo

translations.definition: The migration of individuals into a particular population or area from other populations or areas.  Compare with emigration.

bee doo ihodééłníinii.definition: Hinááhts'ózí dóó akááz éí doodago atsą́ siléí bitoo' t'áádoole'é ba'át'e' dahólóonii yich'ą́ą́h naalnishígíí

translations.definition: A collection of cells and organs that help to defend an organism against pathogens.
A single, separate organism distinguished from others of the same kind

naałniih ihodiiłt'i'.definition: Ba'át'e' hólóonii (pathogen) bits'ą́ą́dóó ii'noot'į́į́' doodago łóód haleehgo doo ákójít'ée da jileehígíí: naałniih (virus), ch'osh doo yit'íinii, éí doodago yaa' ádaat'éii.

translations.definition: An illness caused by a pathogen, such as a virus, bacteria, or parasite.

ąąh dahaz'ą́ yiłnih.definition: Ats'íís yihodiiłt'hii dóó yąąh dahooł'aahii idahidilnéehgo

translations.definition: The process of passing on illness or disease.

bił oochíiłii bee hazhdiidzaa.definition: Hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii binahjį' yee hadít'éhígíí bił ho'dizhchį́įgo

translations.definition: To receive a particular characteristic from a parent, usually through genes that are passed from parent to offspring.

doo hináanii.definition: Ha'át'íi da doo dahináa dago daholónígíí bee ályaa. Hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́'go éí organic át'ée doo.

translations.definition: Made of non-living materials. Compare with organic.

ch'osh.definition: Hináanii ch'osh bidi'nínígíí éí hastą́ą́ bijáád dóó bits'a' dahólǫ́ǫgo yee bits'íís niłdzil éí exoskeleton wolyé.

translations.definition: Small animals with six legs and a hard outer shell called an exoskeleton.

ájoot'įįł t'áá hooshch'į' bee joogáałii.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii áát'įįłígíí t'áá bíni' dóó bintsékees át'éego bił yizhchį́, doo t'áá bí yíhooł'ą́ą' da.

translations.definition: An inherited behavior by animals that is not learned

hinááhts'ózi noosééł.definition: Hinááhts'óóz dínéesą́ą́dóó biyi'di iiná bitł'óól bééda'alne' silį́į'jį

translations.definition: The period of time when a cell grows and copies of DNA are made.
Between or among cells

hináanii ach'į' nahwiiłná.definition: Haa'í da t'áá íídą́ą́' yá'át'éehgo haz'ą́ągo hináanii nááná łahdę́ę́' yikahgo yah ee'nil nít'ę́ę́' ákwe'é dahinánígíí dóó haz'ánígíí yich'į' nidahwiilná silį́įgo

translations.definition: A species that was introduced to an ecosystem that was not there before and that causes hardship to other organisms Haa
Any animal lacking a spinal cord (also known as a backbone). Compare with vertebrate.
Atom or molecule with an electric charge

na'alkaahgóne'.definition: Haa'í da haz'ą́ągo ákone' éé'deetįįh biniyé nida'alkaah, nida'nitin, éí doodago azee' dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ béésh da, tó da, níłch'i da ałtah ádaalne'go bee t'áadoole'é ádaalne'

translations.definition: A place for science experiments, teaching, or the making of medicine or chemicals

ak'ah bizhool.definition: Hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí doo tó bee nídí'eełii ákondi t'áá yił ahedaałt'éhígíí éí yee nídí'eeł. Bee hinááhts'ózí bik'ésti'ígíí nidahaleeh.

translations.definition: Any organic material that does not dissolve in water but will dissolve in organic materials.  They are often used to make cell membranes.

t'áádoo hodina'í daneezná.definition: Hináanii ła' dahyikah nít'ę́ę́' t'áa hodina'í noonééł

translations.definition: Extinction of a large number of species within a short period of time

ak'eelyéí.definition: Hináanii biką'ígíí bik'eelyéí. Dabi'áádígíí ałdó' bik'eelyéí hólǫ́, biyeezhii (egg) deiłní.

translations.definition: The male sex cell, or gamete in animals.  Compare with egg.

hinááhts'ózí ałts'á níséego iiná bitł'óó.word: hinaahtsozi altsa niseego iina bitlool alkee niikah
hinááhts'ózí ałts'á níséego iiná bitł'óó.definition: Hinááhts'ózí t'ááłáhádi éí doodago naakidi ałts'áníséego iiná bitł'óól ałníi'gi hasht'e' niikáahgo hodinaahígíí.

translations.definition: The time during mitosis or meiosis where copies of chromosomes line up in the center of a cell

doo yit'íinii bee nél'íní.definition: Bee adéest'į́į́' ha'át'íi da áłts'íísígo doo yit'į́į da nidi nitsaago daat'į́įgo ádeile'

translations.definition: A device that makes very small objects or organisms larger so that they can be observed

kéyah bii'iinééh dóó háá'iinééh.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii kéédahat'į́įgi yah ahekááh dóó ch'éédahakááh.

translations.definition: The movement of individuals in and out of a population or area

hináanii éél'íní.definition: Ha'át'íi da hináanii nááná ła' hináanii yenoolnin, biinéé' yił aheełt'é, éí doodago yeel'į́įgo naaghá.

translations.definition: When one organism looks, sounds, or behaves like another species.

hadaat'e'.definition: Nahasdzáán biyi'dę́ę́' t'áádoole'é doo dahináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' hólónígíí

translations.definition: An inorganic substance that occurs naturally

bee iinéí ííł'íní.definition: Hinááhts'ózí bitsą́ siléí ch'iyáán néidił'eeł dóó yee bidziil dóó biinéí yileehígíí

translations.definition: An organelle that takes in nutrients, breaks them down, and creates energy (ATP) for the cell

hinááhts'ózí ádéé'iiyaa.definition: Hinááhts'ózí t'ááłá'í si'ánígíí ałts'á níséehgo naaki yileehígíí

translations.definition: When a single cell divides into two identical cells

azhool ałch'į' siláhígíí.definition: Atom naaki éí doodago díkwíi da ahidiilyáago binitsiniltł'ish bináhaazléí (electrons) ahiidiinił

translations.definition: Two or more atoms that are joined because they share electrons

hináanii hinááhts'óóz łą́ągo yee hadít'é.definition: Hináanii bits'íís hinááhts'ózí łą́ągo yee hadít'éhígíí. Ła'éí hinááhts'ózí t'ááłá'ígo bits'íís nilį́.

translations.definition: Organisms that consist of more than one cell. Compare with unicellular.
A permanent alteration in the DNA sequence

hináanii ał'ąą át'é ahíłká aná'ahinilché.definition: Hináanii doo t'ááła' nilį́į da nidi ahíłká aná'ahinilchxéehgo

translations.definition: Association between organisms of two different species in which each benefits

doo łahgo áyooliił da.definition: Ha'át'íi da naalnishgo hoolzhish nít'ę́ę́' ni'áániił silį́į́' dóó bits'ą́ą́dóó doo łahgo áhooniił da yileeh éí náasdi hasht'e didooteeł

translations.definition: When the outcome of a process reduces further change and the process becomes stable

t'áá łahígi niighááh.definition: Ha'át'íi da naalnishgo hoolzhish nít'ę́ę́' ni'áániił silį́į́' dóó bits'ą́ą́dóó doo łahgo áhooniił da yileeh éí náasdi hasht'e didooteeł

translations.definition: When the outcome of a process reduces further change and the process becomes stable

ats'óóz.definition: Ats'óóz t'áá łá'í nít'i'ígíí ats'íístahdi łą́ągo ahidadiit'i'go ats'íís yee ákonízin

translations.definition: Nerves are a collection of neurons that carry signals throughout the body

ats'óóz bee hahodít'é.definition: Atsiighąą', atsiighąą' íígháán bii'nít'i'ígíí dóó ats'óóz t'áá ałtso hináanii bits'íís yee hadít'éhígíí ats'íístahgóó da'ahi'niihgo ats'íís hiná.

translations.definition: The brain, spinal cord, and nerves of an animal that together receive messages from other parts of the body and control how the body functions

atsiniltł'ish yooléełii.definition: Ats'óóz t'áá łá'í nít'i'ígíí bitsiniltł'ish bąąhgóó hólǫ́. Nerve cell ałdó' deiłní.

translations.definition: Cells that carry electrical charges through the body and are part of the nervous system. Also known as a nerve cell.

bitsiniltł'ish ádin.definition: Atom yee hadít'éhígíí atsiniltł'ish bąąhgóó ádin.

translations.definition: The components of an atom that have no charge

níłch'i nitrogen hinílá.definition: Níłch'i t'óó ahayóijį' t'áádoole'é dabitah nahasdzáán bikáagi, nahasdzáán biyi'góó, hót'áahdi níłch'i biyi'góó, dóó dahinánígíí bitahgóó ahéénílį́.

translations.definition: The movement of nitrogen through living organisms, the atmosphere, and the ground.

iiná bitł'óól bee ályaii.definition: Iiná bitł'óól, DNA dóó RNA bee haleehígíí (base deiłníigo hináanii bee hodooleełígíí)

translations.definition: The building blocks of the RNA and DNA, also known as 'bases'. The symbols for the four bases are A, T, G, and C.

hinááhts'ózí bijéí.definition: Hinááhts'óóz yee naalnishgo biyi'di iiná bitł'óól ak'ah bineestiin, plasma. bik'í da'asti'go daholǫ́.

translations.definition: The part of the cell that controls the functions of the cell and where DNA is found within a plasma membrane

ats'íís yee hináanii.definition: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ yidą́ągo bee na'nise', bee anoosééł, dóó binahjį' naanish ła' yit'ínígíí.

translations.definition: A substance that is needed for healthy growth, development, and function

haalzííd.definition: Na'alkaahgo bééhózin silį́į'ii anáá' bee yitį́įgo haalzíídígíí.

translations.definition: The data measured or seen, often during an experiment

ch'il dóó naaldloozhii yiyání.definition: Hináanii ch'il dóó hináanii naaldeehígíí bich'iiyą' áyósinígíí.

translations.definition: An animal that eats both plants and animals

ats'íístahdi ahil naalnishí.definition: Atsą́siléí t'áá ał'ąą át'éego binaanish dahólónígíí.

translations.definition: A group of tissues in the body that has a specific form and function

hinááhts'ózí bitsą́siléí.definition: Hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di si'ą́ągo bik'ésti'ii hólǫ́ áádóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ binaanish.

translations.definition: A structure within a cell that is enclosed within its own membrane and has a function
Made of or made by living organisms. Compare with inorganic.
A living thing
A chemical element found in the air

yaa'.definition: T'áádoole'é hináago nááná łahjį' hináanii choyooł'į́įgo yee hinánígíí.

translations.definition: An organism that lives on or in another organism (its host).

yaa'k'ehgo hiná.definition: Hináanii nááná ła' choo'į́įgo bee jiináago.

translations.definition: The practice of living as a parasite in or on another organism

hináanii doo yit'íinii ba'át'e' hólóonii.definition: Naałniih éí doodago ch'osh doo yit'íinii ba'át'e' hólǫ́ǫgo ats'íís biyi'di yihodiiłt'ihii.

translations.definition: A microorganism that causes, or can cause, disease or harm in the organism it lives in or on (its host)

náás ahoolchíiłii yildił.definition: Náás oochííł, bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' oodáał ii naaltsoos bikáá' naashch'ąą'

translations.definition: A drawing that shows how ancestors and descendents are related

ats'íís silį́į' yit'į́ dóó bí'neel'ąąh b.word: atsiis silii yiti doo bineelaah biighah
ats'íís silį́į' yit'į́ dóó bí'neel'ąąh b.definition: Bíla'ashdla'ii hazlį́į'go ánoolnin dóó át'éegi yit'į́įgo dóó bí'neel'ąąh bihónéedzą́ągo.

translations.definition: A trait of an individual that can be observed or measured

ch'il dootł'izhí dóó dahinánii shá yee b.word: chil dootlizhi doo dahinanii sha yee biinei
ch'il dootł'izhí dóó dahinánii shá yee b.definition: Ch'il, nanise', dóó dahináanii ła' shánídíín yee bidziil dóó biinéígo áyósinígíí.

translations.definition: The process by which green plants and certain other organisms turns energy from the sun into chemical energy

ats'íís hiná silį́į́' naalkaah.definition: Hináanii bits'íís naalnishígíí éí doodago na'alkaahk'ehgo dahináanii bits'íís naalnishígíí bíhoo'aah.

translations.definition: How an organism's body functions or the scientific study of how organisms function
The species that appear first in recently disturbed areas

chʼil.definition: Nanise' ałtsaas'éí dóó ch'il shánídíín yee bidziilgo á'dólzingo hinánígíí.

translations.definition: An organism capable of photosynthesis
The non-cellular portion of blood

akágí biyi'dę́ę́ ak'ah bizhool bik'ésti'.definition: Ak'ah bineestiin dóó protein naneesdizgo akágí nilį́įgo t'áádoole'é bikí daasti'

translations.definition: A network of lipids and proteins that forms the boundary between the inside of a cell and the environment that surrounds it.  Also called a cell membrane.

i’niiyą́ą́.definition: T'áádoole'é bááhádzidii tł'óó'di nahaz'ą́ą́góó yahiigeehgo. Díí bááhádzidii pollutants wolyé.

translations.definition: The introduction of harmful materials into the environment. These harmful materials are called pollutants.

t'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągi anoosééł.definition: T'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągi bíla'ashdla'ii éí doodago dahináanii t'áá ahedaałt'éhígíí kééhat'į́ dóó da'ahéelchííh

translations.definition: A group of individuals of the same species living and reproducing within a given area

t'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągi noot'į́į́ł.definition: Dahináanii kééhat'į́įgi haadahoníłtsogo hahoodzogo bii' haashį́į́ néelt'e' naaldeehígíí.

translations.definition: The number of individuals of the same species living within a given area

t'áádoole'é hooleełgo łahgo áhooliił.definition: Ha'átíi da álnéehgo bil hoolzhishgo álnééhígíí náás áániił éí doodago ni'áániił silį́į́'

translations.definition: When the outcome of a process causes further change and the process increases or decreases

naalzheehii na'ałtseed.definition: Hináanii dahináanii nááná ła' neitseed dóó yiyą́ągo.

translations.definition: The killing and eating of one organism (the prey) by another (the predator)

naalzheehii.definition: Dahináanii hináanii náánáła' neiłtseed dóó yiyą́ąyee hiná

translations.definition: An organism that lives mostly by killing and eating other animals
The period of time in which an unborn offspring is carried within the body.

nidaalzheehii bich'iiyą'.definition: Dahináanii nááná łahdę́ę́' hináanii nida'ałtseedii chodabooł'ínígíí

translations.definition: An organism that is hunted or caught for food, usually by a predator.

ha'át'íi da doonííł nawólní.definition: Haa da hoot'éedoo le' hasingo éí doodago na'alkaahgo naalkaahii ádoonííł nawólnínígíí

translations.definition: The chance that something will happen or of a hypothesis being correct

hinánii ch'iyáán bá siláii.definition: Dahináanii shánídíín choyooł'į́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziil dahólǫ́ éí ts'ídá binahjį' ch'iyáán nihwiileeh

translations.definition: Organisms that are capable of photosynthesis and are the basis of a food chain.

hinááhts'óóz ałts'á nooseeł.definition: Hinááhts'óóz ał'ąą át'éego ałts'á níséego, mitosis éí doodago meiosis, alą́ąjį' bee hahalzhííshígíí

translations.definition: The first stage of mitosis or meiosis where chromosomes are compressed

ch'iyáán bee ats'íís haleehii.definition: Ch'iyáán ats'íís bee haleeh dóó hasht'éé yoodlííłígíí, protein, bee haleehígíí, amino acid, da'ahólzha' daaleeh dóó nidaat'ood łeh

translations.definition: A chain of amino acids that can fold into a specific shape

atom bitsiniltł'ish shá bik'ehgo siláii.definition: Atoms yee hadit'éhígíí biniltł'ish shábik'ehgo, clockwise or consistent with the sun's path, siláhígíí bąąh hólǫ́

translations.definition: The components of an atom that have a positive charge

ats'íís ał'ąą át'é naashch'ąą'.definition: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii ał'ąą ádaat'éego bee hazhdít'éhígíí naasch'ąą'go ál'įįhígíí. Dik'ą́ągo si'ą́ą łeh.

translations.definition: A square drawing used to show the different genotypes possible in the offspring when two individuals reproduce

akéédóó héesdá.definition: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo át'é silį́į́'ígíí, allele, akéédóó naalnishgo bik'ehgo ats'íís haidiił'įįh béé'ályaago naaki hwee hólónígíí.

translations.definition: The allele that only determines the phenotype when the organism has two copies of it. Compare with dominant.

bee hojileehii akéédóó héesdáii.definition: Hats'íís dóó ájít'éhígíí bił ho'dizhchínígíí hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' nízhdiiláhígíí éí bik'ehgo náás oochíił'ii akéédóó naalnishígíí, recessive, bik'ehgo hojizhlį́į́'.

translations.definition: An inherited characteristic that appears in an offspring if it is received from a parent through a recessive allele. Compare with dominant trait.
The blood cells that carry oxygen

doo oochííł bá haz'ą́ą da.definition: Haa'í da ha'át'íi da dahináanii t'ááłáhági bił haz'ą́ą doo nida'iiłchíigo hodeeshzhiizh

translations.definition: The situation where similar species may live in the same area, but they are unable to reproduce.

oochííł bá siláii.definition: Ats'íís biyi'di bee idínótsąął dóó adoochííł biniyé dahólónígíí

translations.definition: The group of organs involved in reproduction

naʼałkaah.definition: Na'alkaah bee éé'deetánígíí náás hideesnilgo íhoo'aah bínááhiniidééh

translations.definition: The creation of new knowledge or the use of existing knowledge in a new way so as to create new concepts, methods, and understandings

dahináanii bidziil.definition: Hináanii naayéé' doo bidééłníi da á'dólzin

translations.definition: The ability of an organism to withstand harmful effects

níłch'i hwiinéí hósin.definition: Hináanii náhididziihgo níłch'i carbon dioxide yił hahayooł, níłch'i oxygen yił ahedziih, dóó níłch'i dóó łikání bits'íístah hólónígíí ałtah ííł'į́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziilígíí ííł'į́

translations.definition: The process in which organisms release carbon dioxide, take in oxygen, and combine oxygen and sugar in order to produce energy (ATP)

níłch'i hwiihíílá dóó hááhiilá.definition: Atsą́ siléí internal organs ła' ats'íís biyi'di dóó ats'íís binaadę́ę́' níłch'I ałnánáálį́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziilgo ábósin

translations.definition: The group of organs involved in the exchange of gas between an organism and the environment to make energy (respiration).

na'alkaah bibeehaz'áanii.definition: Ałkéé' honí'ą́ągo na'alkaah bee doo naaki nilį́į́góó éé'deetį́į́h dóó íhoo'aah. I'diił'áii bééhózingo ál'įįh, át'éedoo dóó nídleeł baa nitáháskéezgo saad ál'įįh, díí baa nitsáháskéézígíí naalkaah,

translations.definition: A way for scientists to study and learn things. In the first step, a problem is identified, then a hypothesis is made from existing information, and then the hypothesis is tested with an experiment.

naʼałkaahí.definition: Na'alkaah yeda'aniihgo éé'deetįįh yinidaalnish dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ hiná éí doodago naalnishgi át'áo yéé'dítį́į́h. Hada'asííd, ída'neeł'ąąh, dóó bił bééhoozinígíí yaa dahalne'.
naʼałkaahí.literal: Naʼałkaahíí=thing that does the investigating "Reseacher" . naʼałkaah=research, the íí is what makes it describing.

translations.definition: People who discover new things and research how things work. They observe, measure, and communicate results

iiná dooleełii.definition: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizígíí, chromosome, bee at'ééd éí doodago ashkii jileehígíí bąąhgi hólónígíí

translations.definition: A gene that is located on a sex chromosome

oochííł.definition: Bee idí'nóotsąął amá dóó azhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' ahidii'ashgo bee t'áá sahdii ázhnoolningo dóó ájít'éego hojileehígíí

translations.definition: The combination of gametes from two individuals to form unique offspring that are genetically different from their parents

ats’íísts’in.definition: Ats'íís biyi'di nitł'izgo ats'íís bá naaz'á éí ats'íís yee sizį́ dóó naha'ná
ats’íísts’in.literal: akágí= skin (you modify the a depending what you're talking about)

translations.definition: The internal hard structure that supports the body of a living thing

shánídíín.definition: Shá, jį́honaa'éí, bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' adinídíín, bits'áníłdoii, dóó bits'áshígishii

translations.definition: Light, heat, and other kinds of energy given off by the Sun

haniihii.definition: Dahináanii t'ááła' dahyikahgo ts'ídá bá yá'áhoot'éehgo haz'ą́ągi yee hináanii bá hólǫ́ǫgo t'éí náás yikah

translations.definition: A species that requires specific environmental conditions or specific types of resources. Compare with generalist.

hináanii da'ahéelchííh.definition: Dahináanii t'ááłá'í danilį́įgo ałhá nida'iiłchíigo noosééł

translations.definition: A group of organisms that can reproduce with one another and produce fertile offspring

atsiighąą' íígháán bii'nít'i'.definition: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii atsiighąą' bits'ánít'i' dóó bíígháán bii' nít'i'go ats'iighąą' dóó ats'íístahgó áhoot'éii yił ééhósin

translations.definition: Structure that begins at the the brain and continues down the spine and carries messages between the brain and the rest of the body.
The main form of stored carbohydrates in plants.

baa hą́ą́hasin.definition: Nahasdzáán bikáá' honí'ą́ą́góó ha'át'ííshį́į́ chodaa'ínígíí nihwiileehígíí doo bilááhgóó choo'į́į da

translations.definition: When a resource from the environment is not used faster than it is produced in nature.

ałhee hi'ná.definition: Hináanii doo t'ááła' nilį́į da nidi ałch'ishdę́ę́' ahee hidi'ná

translations.definition: Any longǫterm physical relationship between individuals of two different species, including mutualism and parasitism.

yízhí dóó óolyéhígíí.definition: Na'alkaahk'ehgo t'áá ałtsoní bízhi' dóó íiyisíí át'éhígíí baa hane'

translations.definition: The science of naming and describing organisms.

akéyah.definition: Haa'í da haz'ą́ągo hináanii choyooł'į́įgo yaa hóchį'gi
akéyah.literal: would need to specify "who's land/area". Keya is land

translations.definition: Any area defended by an organism or a group of similar organisms for their own use

bik'ehgo na'alkaahii.definition: T'áá ha'át'íi da át'éegi dóó naalnishígi át'éego baa hane' dóó nábinázláago binahjį' áhá'nínígíí łą́ bééhózingo

translations.definition: An explanation for why things work or how things happen that is supported by a large amount of scientific evidence

aziil.definition: Hado bee ayoonaałgo t'áá ha'át'íi da yee hadít'éii, molecules, ahídaha'náahgo yee niidoh dóó bits'á níłdoii

translations.definition: This type of energy (also known as heat energy) is created when molecules move around quickly and randomly within a substance, which releases heat.

hinááhts'óóz ahii' silá.definition: Hinááhts'ózí t'áá ahedaałt'éego dóó binaanish t'ááłá'ígo

translations.definition: A group of cells that perform a similar function
A characteristic of an organism that can be observed.

hináanii ch'iyáán nilį́.definition: Hináanii ayą́ągo hiná dóó áadi ha'át'ííshį́į́ bich'iiyą' nánídlį́į́góne'

translations.definition: An organism's position along a food chain

hinááhts'óóz naagháii.definition: Hináanii hinááhts'óóz t'ááłá'ígo bits'íís nilį́. Hináanii náádaała' éí hinááhts'óóz łą́ągo yee bits'íís dahólǫ́.

translations.definition: Organisms that consist of one cell. Compare with multicellular.

łizh bá haz'ą́ągi.definition: Ats'íís biyi'di siláhígíí ats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdígíí níláhgóó yits'ą́ąjį' kwííł'ínígíí

translations.definition: The organs that remove waste from the body.

bíígháán dahólónígíí.definition: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, bits'íísts'in dóó bitsiighąą' bíígháán bii' danít'i' ígíí

translations.definition: An animal that has a spinal cord and a skeleton. Compare with invetebrate.

ats'iis.definition: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís biyi'di binaanish t'ááła'ígo hólónígíí, tissues, ats'ą́ siláii ats'íís biyi'di hólǫ́ nidi doo choo'į́į dago yits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' yigáałii bits'íís hólónígíí ła' choyooł'į́ dóó binaanish hólónígíí t'áá yił aheełt'é

translations.definition: Cells, tissues, or organs in a body that have no apparent function and is similar to a functioning organ or structure in an ancestor.

naałniih.definition: Hináanii doo yit'į́į dago nááná łahdę́ę́' yigáałgo ats'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di hiná silį́į́', dóó áadi hinááhts'óóz yee binahjį' noosééł yileeh áádóó bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ haleeh

translations.definition: A small parasite that lives within the cells of other organisms, cannot reproduce without the help of the cell it lives inside of, and causes disease.

tó binahat'a'.definition: Tó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó biyi' hólǫ́  dóó hót'ááhgóó dahólǫ́ éí hoo'nááł dóó danílínígíí bił ahééhwiizhíísh

translations.definition: The movement of water on, above, or below the surface of our planet.

dił łigaaí.definition: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís yee bihodééłníi da áyósin éí ii'noot'į́į́', infection, dóó ąąh dahwiidooł'aałii yich'ą́ą́h naalnish

translations.definition: Cells that are part of the body's immune system that help the body fight infection and other diseases.

naaldeehii naalkaah.definition: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, ał'ąą át'éego dahyikahígíí haalzííd dóó naalkaahgo bíhoo'aah

translations.definition: The scientific study of animals

awéé'.definition: Amá dóó azhé'é bik'eelyéí bee i'niitsąądgo

translations.definition: The cell that forms after gametes are joined.
